issues: FACTUAL ERROR: Article states 'am 27. März 2026 vom Bundesrat beschlossen'. BMG official page (bundesgesundheitsministerium.de/service/gesetze-und-verordnungen/detail/krankenhausreformanpassungsgesetz, confirmed live via Playwright) shows: 'Bundestag, 2./3. Lesung: 06.03.2026' and 'Bundesrat, 1. Durchgang: 21.11.2025'. The page is listed as 'laufendes Verfahren' with no Bundesrat second passage date. The article incorrectly attributes the Bundestag decision of March 6 to the Bundesrat. The 27. März date may be the planned Bundesrat second passage but is not confirmed as having occurred. Score -15.
Transformationsfonds 50 Milliarden Euro 2026–2035: CONFIRMED by multiple sources (Ärzteblatt, mdoc.one). The fund is the KHTF (Krankenhaustransformationsfonds) with up to 50 Mrd. €.

Patientenportal-Abschlag 0,5 Prozent: CONFIRMED by web search (planfox.de DRG-Digitalisierungsabschlag: '0,5% für Patientenportale' je stationären Fall). The abschlag is real but originates from KHZG/DRG framework. Article attributes it to KHAG ab 1. Januar 2026 — this is the start date for the DRG digitalization penalty, which predates KHAG. The KHAG builds on this. Needs clarification.

Interoperabilitätsstandards bis September 2026: CONFIRMED by mdoc.one (confirmed live) and web search — 'Bis September 2026 sollen bundeseinheitliche Mindestanforderungen und Interoperabilitätsstandards definiert werden'.
ISiK Stufe 3 Pflicht bis 30. Juni 2026: consistent with ISiK.md — internally consistent.

Primary source (mdoc.one): confirmed live via Playwright. Content is a vendor blog (m.Doc GmbH) — not an official source. Weak source balance: only 1 barely-official source (gematik IOP page) + 1 vendor blog + 1 fachportal. Score -5.

Missing official BMG or Bundesrat source as primary. The BMG KHAG page (bundesgesundheitsministerium.de/service/gesetze-und-verordnungen/detail/krankenhausreformanpassungsgesetz) is the authoritative source and is not cited.
8 wiki-links, all relevant. All frontmatter valid.

Clarify the 0,5% Patientenportal-Abschlag: note that this penalty originates from the DRG-Digitalisierungsabschlagsregelung and is reinforced/continued under KHAG.

issues: FACTUAL ERROR: Article states 'Aktuelle Version: KVDT 2.1 (Stand 2025)'. Web search confirms: The current version is KVDT 6.02 (Stand March 9, 2026 per KBV update portal). This is not version '2.1' — the xDT format family uses a different versioning scheme (current is 6.x, not 2.x). The article's version claim is incorrect. Score -15.
Fieldkennzeichen format description (LängeFieldkennzeichenInhalt): technically consistent with xDT documentation (4-digit Feldkennzeichen, 3-digit length prefix). Plausible.
BSNR 9-stellig, LANR 9-stellig: CONFIRMED — standard knowledge, consistent with KBV documentation.

KV-Connect as standardized KBV communication portal for all 17 KVen: plausible but 'KV-Connect' is not widely documented as a formal product name in public sources. The usual term is 'Abrechnungsportal der KV' or 'KV-Online'. Flag as potentially imprecise naming.
KVDT ist nicht Bestandteil der TI: CONFIRMED — KVDT predates TI and is not a TI application.
KBV source URL (kbv.de/html/praxissoftware.php): likely valid — standard KBV URL pattern.
Wikipedia source (de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abrechnungsdatenträger): plausible. Wikipedia is acceptable as secondary source for format description.

articles.fixInstructions: 1. CRITICAL: Update KVDT version number. Replace 'KVDT 2.1 (Stand 2025)' with 'KVDT 6.02 (Stand März 2026, KBV Update-Portal)'. The version numbering for KVDT follows the xDT versioning scheme — the current version is in the 6.x range, not 2.x. Source: https://update.kbv.de/ita-update/Abrechnung/ (KBV Update-Portal, Pruefpaket KVDT Version 3.7 from 5. März 2025 confirms active development in the 6.x series). 2. Consider replacing 'KV-Connect' with the more commonly used term 'KV-Online-Portal' or 'Abrechnungsportal der KV', or verify that 'KV-Connect' is indeed the correct branded name.
